# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-serviceentry
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-api-virtualservice
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  gateways:
  - mesh
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.thirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database-serviceentry
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.external-provider.com
  ports:
  - number: 5432 # Example: PostgreSQL port
    name: postgres
    protocol: TCP
  - number: 3306 # Example: MySQL port
    name: mysql
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-database-virtualservice
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.external-provider.com
  gateways:
  - mesh
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
    route:
    - destination:
        host: db.external-provider.com
        port:
          number: 5432
  - match:
    - port: 3306
    route:
    - destination:
        host: db.external-provider.com
        port:
          number: 3306
